case_title: LEONARD TRAN et al VS. BENJI SIMONTON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,540.54 FILED BY TRAN, LEONARD TRAN, BAI AS TO DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI MILOVA, KRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAR-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MILOVA, KRISTINA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LEONARD TRAN ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO KRISTINA MILOVA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-18-2011 AT 6:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, LEONARD TRAN, BAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT KRISTINA MILOVA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AFFIDAVIT RE DEATH OF PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, LEONARD
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR TRAN, LEONARD ASSIGNED TO QUAN, HENDSON
QUAN, HENDSON IS NO LONGER ASSIGNEE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF REASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE QUAN, HENDSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,775.56 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE ANDERSON COLLECTION SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI
